_comment: Fresh pseudocodes written based on Japanese ability texts - NOT a replacement for manual_pseudocode.json
_purpose: Comparison with original manual_pseudocode.json to identify discrepancies

PL!-sd1-002-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED
COST: MOVE_TO_DISCARD
EFFECT: RECOVER_MEMBER(1) -> CARD_HAND

PL!-sd1-004-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(5) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=0, TYPE_LIVE"} -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!-sd1-005-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED
COST: MOVE_TO_DISCARD
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) -> CARD_HAND

PL!-sd1-006-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: REVEAL_HAND(1) {TYPE_LIVE} (Optional)
EFFECT: SELECT_MEMBER(1) {ZONE="SUCCESS_LIVE"} -> TARGET; RECOVER_MEMBER(TARGET) -> CARD_HAND; MOVE_REVEALED_TO_SUCCESS

PL!-sd1-011-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(3) -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!-sd1-015-SD.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(5) {FILTER="TYPE_MEMBER"} -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!-PR-003-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: DISCARD_HAND(2)
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="HEARTS_GE_3, HEART_03"} -> CARD_HAND

PL!-PR-004-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: DISCARD_HAND(2)
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="HEARTS_GE_3, HEART_01"} -> CARD_HAND

PL!-PR-005-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: SELECT_MODE(1)
  OPTION: ドロー | EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(1) -> PLAYER
  OPTION: ウェイト | EFFECT: TAP_OPPONENT(99) {FILTER="COST_LE_2"} -> OPPONENT

PL!-PR-007-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: TAP_SELF (Optional)
EFFECT: TAP_OPPONENT(1) {FILTER="COST_LE_4"} -> OPPONENT

PL!S-PR-013-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(3) -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(2) -> SELF

PL!N-bp1-019-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(1) -> PLAYER

PL!N-PR-003-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: REVEAL_HAND_ALL
CONDITION: HAS_MEMBER {TARGET="OTHER"}, NOT HAS_LIVE_CARD {ZONE="HAND"}
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(5) {FILTER="TYPE_LIVE"} -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!N-PR-005-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: DRAW(2) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(2) -> PLAYER

PL!SP-PR-009-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> SELF
CONDITION: DISCARDED_LIVE
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER

PL!HS-PR-001-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(3) -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> SELF

PL!HS-PR-016-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(2) {FILTER="SAME_UNIT"} (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_HEARTS(2) {HEART_TYPE=4}; ADD_BLADES(2) -> SELF

PL!HS-PR-017-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(2) {FILTER="SAME_UNIT"} (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_HEARTS(2) {HEART_TYPE=5}; ADD_BLADES(2) -> SELF

PL!HS-PR-018-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(2) -> SELF

PL!HS-PR-020-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: MOVE_TO_DECK(2) {FROM="DISCARD", FILTER="TYPE_MEMBER"} -> DECK_TOP

LL-PR-004-PR.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
EFFECT: SELECT_MODE(1) -> PLAYER
  OPTION: チョコミント/ストロベリー/クッキー＆クリーム | EFFECT: DISCARD_HAND(1) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(1) -> OPPONENT
  OPTION: あなた | EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER; DRAW(1) -> OPPONENT
  OPTION: その他 | EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> PLAYER; ADD_BLADES(1) -> OPPONENT

LL-bp1-001-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: RECOVER_MEMBER(1) -> CARD_HAND

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(3) {FILTER="Ayumu/Kanon/Kaho"} (Optional)
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE(3) -> SELF

PL!N-bp1-001-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> SELF

PL!N-bp1-002-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE_ORDER(3) {REMAINDER="DISCARD"}

TRIGGER: ACTIVATED
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2); DISCARD_HAND(1)
CONDITION: IN_DISCARD
EFFECT: PLAY_MEMBER_FROM_DISCARD(1) -> SELF_SLOT

PL!N-bp1-003-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2"} -> CARD_HAND

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: COLOR_SELECT(1) -> PLAYER; ADD_HEARTS(1) -> SELF

PL!N-bp1-005-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> SELF

PL!N-bp1-006-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1)
CONDITION: MEMBER_PLAYED_THIS_TURN {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2"}
EFFECT: ACTIVATE_ENERGY(2) -> PLAYER

TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2)
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER

PL!N-bp1-009-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: MOVE_TO_DISCARD(2) {FROM="DECK_TOP"}; RECOVER_MEMBER(1) -> CARD_HAND

PL!N-bp1-011-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: REVEAL_UNTIL(TYPE_LIVE) -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!N-bp1-012-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
CONDITION: COUNT_LIVE_ZONE {MIN=3}, HAS_LIVE_CARD {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2", ZONE="LIVE_ZONE"}
EFFECT: ADD_HEARTS(2) {HEART_TYPE=6}; ADD_BLADES(2) -> SELF

TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(3)
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) -> CARD_HAND

PL!N-bp1-026-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_SUCCESS
CONDITION: SCORE_LEAD {TARGET="OPPONENT"}
EFFECT: RECOVER_FROM_CHEER(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2"} -> CARD_HAND

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: META_RULE(ALL_BLADE_AS_ANY_HEART)

PL!N-bp1-027-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE_PER_COLOR(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2"} -> SELF

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: DRAW_PER_CHEER(1)

PL!N-bp1-028-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) (Optional)
CONDITION: HAS_MEMBER {FILTER="GROUP_ID=2"}
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE(1) -> SELF

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: DRAW_PER_CHEER(1)

PL!N-bp1-029-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
CONDITION: COUNT_LIVE_ZONE {MIN=3}
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE(2) -> SELF

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: DRAW_PER_CHEER(1)

PL!SP-bp1-002-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) (Optional)
CONDITION: IN_AREA {AREA="LEFT_SIDE"}
EFFECT: DRAW(2) -> PLAYER

PL!SP-bp1-004-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
CONDITION: IS_CENTER
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(5) -> SELF

PL!SP-bp1-005-R.pseudocode:

EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER
CONDITION: HAS_MEMBER {FILTER="NAME=米女メイ"}
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER

PL!SP-bp1-009-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1)
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(1) -> PLAYER

PL!SP-bp1-010-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2); DISCARD_HAND(1)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(5) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=3"} -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!SP-bp1-012-N.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(3) -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!SP-bp1-024-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
EFFECT: ADD_HEARTS(1) {HEART_TYPE=5} -> MEMBER_KANON; ADD_BLADES(1) -> MEMBER_KANON
EFFECT: ADD_HEARTS(1) {HEART_TYPE=0} -> MEMBER_KEKE; ADD_BLADES(1) -> MEMBER_KEKE

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_SUCCESS
CONDITION: HAS_MEMBER {FILTER="NAME=澁谷かのん"}, HAS_MEMBER {FILTER="NAME=唐可可"}
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: META_RULE(ALL_BLADE_AS_ANY_HEART)

PL!SP-bp1-027-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
CONDITION: COUNT_ENERGY {MIN=12}
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE(1) -> SELF

EFFECT: DRAW_PER_CHEER(1)

PL!HS-bp1-002-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2); MOVE_TO_DISCARD
EFFECT: PLAY_MEMBER_FROM_DISCARD(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, COST_LE_15"} -> SELF_SLOT

PL!HS-bp1-003-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
CONDITION: ALL_AREAS_HAVE_MEMBER {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4", UNIQUE_NAMES=TRUE}
EFFECT: BOOST_SCORE(1) -> SELF

TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1)
EFFECT: RECOVER_MEMBER(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, COST_LE_4"} -> CARD_HAND

PL!HS-bp1-004-R＋.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(3)
EFFECT: RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4"} -> CARD_HAND

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: PAY_ENERGY(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(1) -> SELF {PER_CARD="LIVE_ZONE"}

PL!HS-bp1-006-R＋.pseudocode:

EFFECT: DRAW(2) -> PLAYER; DISCARD_HAND(1) -> PLAYER

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
CONDITION: HAS_MEMBER {TARGET="OTHER"}
EFFECT: COLOR_SELECT(1) -> PLAYER; ADD_HEARTS(1) -> SELF

PL!HS-bp1-007-R.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2)
EFFECT: DRAW(1) -> PLAYER

PL!HS-bp1-009-R.pseudocode:

COST: DISCARD_HAND(1) (Optional)
EFFECT: LOOK_AND_CHOOSE(5) {FILTER="TYPE_LIVE"} -> CARD_HAND, DISCARD_REMAINDER

PL!HS-bp1-021-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_SUCCESS
EFFECT: RECOVER_FROM_CHEER(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, TYPE_LIVE"} -> CARD_HAND

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: META_RULE(ALL_BLADE_AS_ANY_HEART)

PL!HS-bp1-022-L.pseudocode:
TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_SUCCESS
CONDITION: COUNT_CHEER {MIN=10, FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, TYPE_MEMBER"}
